action_text: Change the filter operator from "starts with" to "contains"
rationale: We need the filter operator to be "contains" to match the requirement for Short description containing a specific string.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-c8c8c533-7" into the Short description filter value field
rationale: After setting the operator, we must input the target string so the filter can match the desired entries.
Running the filter will apply the condition and display only entries whose Short description contains the given string.

action_text: Click the Add Sort button in the filter controls
rationale: Sorting by Short description will help group identical descriptions together, making it easier to spot duplicates for deletion later.

action_text: Open the Short description column options menu
rationale: Opening the Short description column options can provide sorting/grouping tools useful for identifying duplicates after filtering.
